response.justification: Maria is primarily a TypeScript/Node.js/DLang developer with minimal Java experience and no Kotlin experience at all. The role demands deep JVM expertise and hands-on work with Spring, Quarkus, and Hibernate — none of which appear in her resume. While she has demonstrated interest in developer tooling (D language test runner, assertion library, NI LabWindows C IDE), this does not transfer meaningfully to the JVM IDE internals and enterprise Java framework integration that the role requires.
strengths: Demonstrated interest in language tooling and developer experience through D-language open source projects (test runner, fluent assertions library)
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) applied consistently across roles
Experience working with high-throughput, complex distributed systems at Dunnhumby
concerns: No Kotlin experience and only superficial Java usage — the two core language requirements are effectively unmet
No exposure to Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or any enterprise Java framework
No evidence of JVM internals knowledge, IDE plugin development, or build tooling (Gradle/Maven) work
